title: Opening for Store Manager at Milton International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Milton International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Milton International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Milton International Enterprises:
Milton International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
